# PROJECT_TODOLIST.md Access Control (SC-TODO)

**PROJECT_TODOLIST.md is STRICTLY FORBIDDEN for direct Agent access.** Read-only artifact generated by F# Planning System. ALL access via `sa-plan` CLI.

**Elixir `mix todo` commands are STRICTLY PROHIBITED and DEPRECATED.**

## Forbidden Actions
- `Read/cat/head/tail/less/grep/rg PROJECT_TODOLIST.md` -> Use `sa-plan list`
- `Write/echo/sed PROJECT_TODOLIST.md` -> Use `sa-plan add/update`
- `mix todo` / `elixir scripts/planning/todolist_manager.exs` -> Use `sa-plan`

## Authorized Access
CLI: `sa-plan list|add|update|status` | Chaya: `chaya list|add|update|ooda`
F# API: `Cepaf.Smriti.Planning.Planner`

## Data Flow
Agent -> sa-plan CLI -> Cepaf.Planning.Manager -> SQLite/DuckDB (AUTHORITATIVE) + PROJECT_TODOLIST.md (read-only artifact) + Zenoh events
